preflop.rationale: 99 is playable but behind TT. Call to see flop. Bot will raise with TT.

flop.rationale: Player hits top set on 9h-3s-2c flop. Bot has overpair TT. Raise for value - bot will call with overpair.

turn.rationale: Blank turn (7d). Set still best. Bot checks. Raise for value.

river.rationale: Blank river (Kc). Set still best. Bot may bet. Raise for max value.

outcome_by_sequence.preflop:call,flop:raise,turn:raise,river: Bot calls all streets with overpair. Player wins with set.
outcome_by_sequence.preflop:call,flop:call,turn:check,river:: Showdown: player wins with set. Smaller pot from passive play.
outcome_by_sequence.preflop:raise: Bot re-raises. Player calls. Set on flop but pot committed.
outcome_by_sequence.preflop:fold: Player folds preflop, loses small blind.
